title: Political Science & Regime Change

tipping_point.mechanism: Preference cascade: private→public threshold = TYPE2 Horizon

revolution.why: Turchin cliodynamics: EML-2 drives (inequality, age structure) → EML-∞ event

duverger_law.formula: Two-party equilibrium under plurality: EML-0 (strategic voting = Boolean)

median_voter.formula: Policy convergence to median: EML-0 (ordering = algebraic)

arrow_impossibility.why: S305: Arrow = EML-0 (Boolean logic over preference orderings)

voting.new_finding: VOTING THEORY = EML-0 DOMAIN: Duverger, Median Voter, Arrow, D'Hondt all algebraic

conflict_trap.formula: Collier-Hoeffler: P(civil war) ~ logistic(income, diversity): EML-2

cascade.mechanism: State failure cascade: EML-∞ (regional contagion cross-type)

power_transition.formula: Power ~ GDP^{0.8}: EML-2 (power law of economic output)

deterrence.formula: MAD: mutually assured destruction = game theory = EML-0 (Nash equilibrium)
deterrence.why: Nash equilibrium = algebraic fixed point = EML-0 (S161)

hegemonic_cycle.why: Economic cycles exp(i·2π·t/50): complex oscillatory = EML-3
hegemonic_cycle.new_finding: KONDRATIEFF WAVES = EML-3: long economic cycles = complex oscillatory

verdicts.voting_theory: EML-0 DOMAIN: Duverger + Median Voter + Arrow + D'Hondt = all algebraic
verdicts.kondratieff: EML-3: long economic cycles = complex oscillatory

key_theorem: Political Science EML Theorem (S343): Voting theory = EML-0 domain: Duverger's Law, Median Voter Theorem, Arrow's Impossibility, D'Hondt allocation — all algebraic (EML-0). Confirms and extends Arrow=EML-0 (S305) across all of formal voting theory. Regime change/revolution = TYPE2 Horizon shadow=2 (GDP, inequality = real measurement drivers). MAD deterrence = EML-0 (Nash equilibrium = algebraic fixed point). NEW: Kondratieff long waves = EML-3 (50-year economic cycles = complex oscillatory): first geopolitical EML-3.
